bullets.details: Leaked documentation suggests Anthropic is testing a high-capability model codenamed \"Claude Mythos,\" which internal teams describe as a significant leap in coding and reasoning, though access is currently restricted due to cybersecurity concerns.
bullets.topic: Anthropic testing highly capable \"Claude Mythos\" model

bullets.details: A federal court has granted a preliminary injunction against the U.S. government, blocking efforts to blacklist AI developer Anthropic based on \"supply chain risk\" designations, which the court labeled as likely retaliatory.
bullets.topic: Judge blocks government attempt to blacklist Anthropic

bullets.details: Reports indicate that Anthropic executives are discussing an initial public offering for as early as Q4, with investment bankers potentially targeting a valuation of over $60 billion.

GitHub is updating its policy to allow for the training of Copilot AI models on interaction data from personal tiers (Free, Pro, Pro+) by default starting April 24, requiring users to manually opt out.
bullets.topic: GitHub to train Copilot on user data by default

bullets.details: The ATLAS framework enables the deployment of high-performing AI coding agents on consumer GPUs by replacing expensive API calls with a local pipeline for planning, verification, and code repair.
bullets.topic: ATLAS: Self-hosted AI coding framework for consumer GPUs

bullets.details: Mistral AI has released Voxtral TTS, an open-source, lightweight text-to-speech model optimized for edge devices and enterprise voice agents, featuring sub-100ms latency.
bullets.topic: Mistral debuts Voxtral TTS for edge devices

bullets.details: A sophisticated supply chain attack on the LiteLLM PyPI package, which attempted to steal developer credentials, was successfully identified and neutralized in 72 minutes using AI-assisted forensic tools.
bullets.topic: AI forensics neutralizes LiteLLM supply chain attack

bullets.details: Meta Ray-Bans are being integrated with AI automation engines, enabling hands-free, real-time control of smartphone applications through live video feed analysis.
bullets.topic: Meta Ray-Bans enable hands-free cross-app automation

bullets.details: Beijing-based startup Moonshot AI has raised $1 billion, pushing its valuation to approximately $2.5 billion, as investor interest in Chinese generative AI continues to grow.
bullets.topic: Moonshot AI raises $1 billion in new funding

bullets.details: A California jury has found Meta and Google liable in a landmark case regarding addictive product design in social media, challenging traditional Section 230 protections by focusing on platform architecture rather than user content.
bullets.topic: Meta and Google found liable in social media addiction trial

digest_summary: Anthropic is making waves with the testing of a potent new model, "Claude Mythos," while winning a legal battle against government blacklisting and signaling a potential $60 billion IPO for Q4. In other industry shifts, GitHub will soon default to training Copilot on user data, while Meta and Google face a legal blow regarding social media addiction. Meanwhile, AI development accelerates with innovations like the ATLAS coding framework, Mistral’s new edge-optimized TTS, and a massive $1 billion funding round for Chinese startup Moonshot AI.
digest_title: Anthropic’s 'Mythos' Leap, IPO Talks, and Major Industry Legal Battles
